ksa_text: Skill in formulating business problems as machine learning problems, including defining the prediction target, identifying appropriate inputs, and establishing measurable success criteria.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-001 (AI & ML/Skill) scores 0.452 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.452). Scope is edge_case for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, AI & ML, composite 0.452. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI & ML for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI & ML appears in ~52% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer postings as secondary competency. AI/ML technical understanding required for review of adaptive SaMD algorithms. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for edge-case inclusion at 52% market penetration.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI & ML without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. AI & ML without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
